transcript: Speaker A: हेलो [Hello] Speaker B: हेलो [Hello] Speaker A: अं... आता काय बोलायचं? [Um... what to say now?] Speaker B: अं... मला पण तेच वाटतंय. [Um... I feel the same.] Speaker A: अं... हाऊ आर यु, नेहा? [Um... How are you, Neha?] Speaker B: आय एम... छान आहे मी. [I am... I am good.] Speaker A: तसं नाही, असं बोल, "आय एम गुड". [Not like that, say it like this, "I am good".] Speaker B: आय एम गुड. [I am good.] Voiceover: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोकं स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: MySivi, Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, Install, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access
summary: A girl struggles to speak English during a call, and a friend corrects her. The ad promotes the MySivi app for spoken English practice, offering a premium trial for just 1 rupee.
